title: Method and apparatus for an information-centric mac layer
abstract: A network element (NE) includes a receiver configured to receive an Information-Centric Media Access Control (i-MAC) frame, a processor operably coupled to the receiver and configured to determine whether an i-MAC table includes routing information for the i-MAC Based Frame, and a transmitter operably coupled to the processor and configured to route the i-MAC Based Frame based on the i-MAC table when the i-MAC table includes information corresponding to the i-MAC Based Frame, and route the i-MAC Based Frame based on a layer 2 (L2) MAC Address Table when the i-MAC table does not contain information corresponding to the i-MAC Based Frame.
claims:
Claims ( 20 ) AĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â (NE)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â receiverĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â Information-CentricĂ‚Â MediaĂ‚Â AccessĂ‚Â ControlĂ‚Â (i-MAC)Ă‚Â frameĂŻÂĽÂ› aĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â receiverĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â determineĂ‚Â whetherĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â tableĂ‚Â includesĂ‚Â routingĂ‚Â informationĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â BasedĂ‚Â FrameĂŻÂĽÂ›Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â transmitterĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â to: routeĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â BasedĂ‚Â FrameĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â tableĂ‚Â whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â tableĂ‚Â includesĂ‚Â informationĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â BasedĂ‚Â FrameĂŻÂĽÂ›Ă‚Â and routeĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â BasedĂ‚Â FrameĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â layerĂ‚Â 2Ă‚Â (L2)Ă‚Â MACĂ‚Â AddressĂ‚Â TableĂ‚Â whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â tableĂ‚Â doesĂ‚Â notĂ‚Â containĂ‚Â informationĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â i-MACĂ‚Â BasedĂ‚Â Frame.
